title: Regression: 2.0.x -> 2.1.x - Image stopped working
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

The images at https://github.com/jesperpedersen/podman-pgsql stopped working after upgrading from Fedora 32 to Fedora 33 (podman 2.0.x to podman 2.1.1)

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. git clone https://github.com/jesperpedersen/podman-pgsql
2. cd podman-pgsql/pgsql12-primary-centos8/
3. make
4. podman run -p 5432:5432 -p 9100:9100 --name postgresql-primary -d -e PG_DATABASE=mydb -e PG_USER_NAME=myuser -e PG_USER_PASSWORD=mypass -e PG_REPLICATION_NAME=repl -e PG_REPLICATION_PASSWORD=replpass -e PG_NETWORK_MASK=all -e PG_MONITOR_NAME=monuser -e PG_MONITOR_PASSWORD=monpass pgsql12-primary-centos8

**Describe the results you received:**

Container didn't start

**Describe the results you expected:**

Container did start

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version 2.1.1
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```

      +SYSTEMD +SELINUX +APPARMOR +CAP +SECCOMP +EBPF +YAJL

  slirp4netns:

```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

cgroups v2, rootless

comments.body: What is the best way to help debug this ?
Well start by saying what do you mean it did not start?  Does it blow up? What errors is it throwing?

`podman logs postgresql-primary` just shows

```
psql: error: could not connect to server: could not connect to server: No such file or directory
	Is the server running locally and accepting
	connections on Unix domain socket "/var/run/postgresql/.s.PGSQL.5432"?
pg_ctl: PID file "/pgdata/postmaster.pid" does not exist
Is server running?
[1] [2020-11-04 10:57:56.599 EST] [] [0] LOG:  invalid value for parameter "lc_messages": "en_US.UTF-8"
[1] [2020-11-04 10:57:56.599 EST] [] [0] LOG:  invalid value for parameter "lc_monetary": "en_US.UTF-8"
[1] [2020-11-04 10:57:56.599 EST] [] [0] LOG:  invalid value for parameter "lc_numeric": "en_US.UTF-8"
[1] [2020-11-04 10:57:56.599 EST] [] [0] LOG:  invalid value for parameter "lc_time": "en_US.UTF-8"
[1] [2020-11-04 10:57:56.599 EST] [] [0] FATAL:  configuration file "/pgdata/postgresql.conf" contains errors
```

The directory is mounted as a volume: https://github.com/jesperpedersen/podman-pgsql/blob/master/pgsql12-primary-centos8/Dockerfile#L58
The configuration is copied over as part of `CMD`: https://github.com/jesperpedersen/podman-pgsql/blob/master/pgsql12-primary-centos8/root/usr/bin/run-postgresql#L101
Does everything work if you run as root.  This could be a change in slirp4netns.  @mheon any ideas?
Running as root gives the same error.
Any chance you can get the output of `podman inspect` from identical containers on 2.0.5 and 2.1.1? Also, can you try 2.0.5 on F33 and 2.1.1 on F32 and see if those work?

Ok, it seems like something in l10n/i18n changed between F32 and F33 when running in a container - making that area fail during startup. Same configuration starts bare metal.

I'll investigate further, but closing this issue for now.

Thanks for your help gentlemen !
